items.title: Repo layout
items.content: Route shell logic lives in web/src/components/shell, reusable UI primitives live in web/src/components/ui, and feature pages stay inside web/src/features/*.

items.title: Safety guardrails
items.content: Do not modify protected files, env files, or benchmark instruction/task files. Avoid destructive commands and preserve unrelated user changes.

items.title: Validation discipline
items.content: Run task-relevant validations after edits and before completion. Prefer targeted tests plus typecheck.

items.title: Orders API pattern
items.content: Orders logic should continue to flow through web/src/lib/api/orders.ts and the existing controller pattern.

items.title: Design system pattern
items.content: Use the shared design-system primitives in web/src/components/ui for empty states, notices, fields, buttons, and cards.
